review_text: Clean and open. Nice breeze and views. Excellent amenities and the staff were great. Great location with many food options and a pub within easy walk. Some traffic noise when the twits play and some lorikeets at dusk. It didn't dampen our stay. We'll be back for sure.

Mühsam, die Reception ist am Wochenende nicht besetzt.. da muss man sich 15 Minuten Seitenweise durch irgendwelche allgemeinen Geschäftsbedingungen klicken, teilweise noch im Bezug auf Corona (Hallo?!?) um dann irgendwann mal zu erfahren, das der Platz ausgebucht sei, obwohl noch Dutzende Plätze leer sind. Kundenfreundlichkeit geht anders.
We’ve been coming here for a couple of years and love it. Park is well kept, amenities are immaculate and Jess & Darren who run the park are ace Highly recommended 👍😎

Fantastic van park with easy access to the beach.
Park managers Jess & Darren are very friendly and do an excellent job and keeping the park, amenities and camp kitchen clean.  I had a beachfront site and it felt so private and relaxing.  I will definitely be coming back again.
Beautiful beachfront location, good amenities, great Wi-Fi, close to restaurants. A little piece of paradise.

Park Manager needs to go, attempted to be rude to me in front of my wife and child. didn't identify himself and i think he was trying to intimidate me somehow, either way, didn't do a good job of it. Tried enforcing rules on to me, although was happy to let others break the same rules and do nothing about it. This is why i prefer off grid. This place would do much better with new management.

Great place.   Right on the beach front, it’s lovely to go to sleep hearing the waves roll ashore.  The ammenities blocks are super clean and a great design.  The awesome lady at the front counter was also super friendly and welcoming.  Just what I needed after a long drive.  You won’t be disappointed if you choose to stay here.
Sehr schöner Camping Platz mit sauberen modernen Anlagen und sehr freundlichem Personal. Kann man auf jeden Fall empfehlen.
Great location and modern ammenities

This newly renovated caravan park was such a surprise with direct beach access. Large grassed sites with concrete pad and water views. Amenities were clean, secure and even though amenities are shared each private bathroom with shower, toilet and sink was a nice surprise. Scarness is a great central location to restaurants, water park, bike paths and shops. The park managers and relief managers were all very knowledgeable and lovely to talk to. We loved our 5 day stay so much that we even extended our stay. Will definitely be back.

Location isn't bad but the managers are unfriendly and difficult to deal with. Lots of rules and regulations to simply setup up camp. They insist on directing you van into site. It has to be parked to the cm.  For what reason, I have no idea. They directed the couples van we were with into a pole when reversing and just ignored it.  Why people like this are in hospitality amazes me.  Definitely go elsewhere.

Just stepped in to enquire about facilities and the manager was quite rude…

Thought Harvey Bay was way better than that .

Cheers

A Beautiful park, close to everything with beach access and good size blocks for the perfect holiday. What makes this park a home away from home are the managers Jess & Darren. They work so hard to keep the park well maintained and clean and they are welcoming and very supportive. We have stayed in many parks from Victoria to Queensland and have never experienced such a fantastic management team. We will return again soon, thanks to Jess & Darren.

Ein sehr gepflegter, grosszügiger Campingplatz mit direktem Zugang zum Strand. Die Sanitäranlagen sind modern, neu und sauber. Das Managerpaar ist super freundlich und äusserst hilfsbereit. Sollten wir wieder nach Hervey Bay zurückkommen, würden wir wieder diesen Campingplatz wählen.
Great clean park, plenty of space between sites. Great management team, friendly and helpful
Great place to stay will be going back again

It’s a amazing place to relax, enjoying the city and the beach. The staff are amazing and really helpful. The internet is so fast, since I’m working online this was really amazing!
I had to leave but would’ve extended my stay 100%
Parfait, gérant très sympathique et à l’écoute. Douche et cuisine très propre. Emplacement en face à même pas 10 mètres de la plage, je conseil fortement
Lovely spot, quiet area but plenty of services, shops, coffee, pub, petrol nearby. And the views are pretty nice too. Friendly team and very clean facilities.
Very nice park. Friendly staff. And very clean.
Really nice spot , handy to shops and dinning , older amenities but very clean , friendly staff , excellent price for powered sites
Friendly Staff. Great position. Right on the beach. Good walking spots. Close to shops.

Un camping avec un emplacement incroyable ! Un service vraiment parfait !! Avec toutes les commodités |D’une grande propreté  !! Et je voudrais encore remercier pour l’accueil et la gentillesse des propriétaires une dame chaleureuse et généreuse |Je recommande vraiment cet endroit vous pouvez y aller les yeux fermés
We have Torquay Beachfront caravan part its very clean and well maintained we can't wait to go back next year. 🙂

We stayed on a beach front site and it was absolutely beautiful. The facilities were clean and worked well. Shops, cafes and restaurants as well as the beach are all a stones throw away. It is right next to a road so you get some road noise but other than that it is an excellent spot to camp.

Outstanding!!!|Rocked in a camper van without a booking and snagged a powered site right on the beach. Waking up to the waves was perfect.|Site manager even offered to lock our e-bikes up in the equipment shed for added security.|The park is on a perfect part of Torquay Beach and the amenities were spotless.|Highly recommended!
Thoroughly enjoying our two weeks here in our van. Such a great spot and the managers do such a great job.

Lovely spot right on the beach
Wake up to the waves crashing at the shore
Good access to the Esplanade shops and markets
Great walking track along the esplanade

Torquay Hervey Bay...Beautiful clean park. Beach front.  No roads to cross. Clean facilities including camp kitchen and laundry. Very friendly, approachable Management who help park vans if required. Basic no frills 70s park. Just wonderful for a relaxing holiday.
3rd revisit to this great park. I’ll be back for a 4th!|Location is perfect. A hop skip & a jump to the beach  A+
Clean and tidy amenities. Centrally located on Esplanade. The sound of birds and shore break to wake up to each morning. It doesn't get much better than that.

Fantastic park with absolute beachfront and beautiful beach to swim in, facilities clean, staff extremely friendly !!! Great location away from the busy part of Hervey Bay , local foodworks walking distance and great bike tracks!!!

We had a lovely 5 night stay in this absolute beachfront caravan park. We swam in the calm ocean every day. While the park is old it is well kept and clean. Shops just across the road and a nice pub with great food 2 blocks away. Some hoon traffic about 9pm most nights but it didn't last too long.

What a beautiful park!  Right on the beach as well! It was so relaxing and quiet and direct access to the beach. Exactly what I was looking for. |The Park Managers and really friendly and helpful. They were able to accommodate an extra night for us at the last minute which I am very thankful for. They also keep the park and amenities in great condition. The kitchen areas and bathroom were pleasant to use. |I am already planning my next stay there.
A lovely park right on the beach. The facilities are cleaned daily and are clean. The staff and manager are all very friendly and helpful.
Clean, quiet nice view, great place to relax and kick back.
Very friendly & close to everything

Our 2nd visit to this caravan park and loved it both times. The managers Jess and Darren are fantastic and very friendly, gave us the best sea view pitch and they keep the ammenaties in immaculate condition. It is very central and we cycled every day (it is all nice and flat 😍). We will be back!
Perfectly clean and friendly staff
Awesome caravan park, new refurbished facilities and close to the beach. Definitely will stay there again.
Excellent caravan park, good facilities.
Awesome but must book to be sure of a table in the mornings
Beautiful Caravan Park. Very friendly and clean.

Great caravan park in a perfect Esplanade location. Amenities and camp kitchen are always spotless, and the grounds are well maintained with lovely grassed areas. Shops are within walking distance, and caravan sites are easy to access. The friendly site managers, Jess and Darren, are incredibly helpful and make you feel welcome. Tours can also be conveniently booked at reception. Highly recommend!
Very friendly and helpful staff. Nice, new clean facilities.  Concrete slab and full grass on sites.  Very easy access straight onto the beach.  Beautiful!
Good facilities, easy beach access, some road noise.
Had a wonderful 10 days here in early July 2025 , nicely laid out , great sites , we were beachfront , nice new clean amenities , helpful staff look forward to staying again

The people running this place are miserable and not very friendly.

Road noise is bad Friday and Saturday nights.

Other than that everything else was pretty good.
Welcoming and helpful, thank you!
Great location & great set up & facilities.  Will be back!
Lovely park in a beautiful location. We could pop to the beach, restaurants and shops so easily. The amenities were good and secure and safe as well.

★★★★★ (Feels like 6 ⭐️)

We honestly couldn’t have asked for a better stay at Fraser Coast Beachfront Tourist Park. The husband and wife managers are absolute legends — genuine, welcoming and they go above and beyond to make sure your stay is not just comfortable but truly special. Nothing was too much trouble and you can tell they genuinely care about their guests.

The park itself is fantastic. Beautifully maintained, spotless and well laid out. The amenities are exceptionally clean and modern, and everything is kept in top condition. It’s clear there’s real pride in the place.

The location is perfect — close to great local restaurants, shops and everything you need, while still offering a relaxed beachfront atmosphere.

We wouldn’t hesitate to recommend this park to anyone visiting the Fraser Coast, and we would stay again in a heartbeat. We also wouldn’t hesitate to recommend the current park managers for any position they choose to pursue — their professionalism, work ethic and genuine care for guests are outstanding.

Five stars isn’t enough — this was a six-star experience for us.

We have stayed at this tourist park twice in 4 years. Whenever we come to Hervey Bay, it just hits the spot right. The space on the caravan spots are generous, the amenities are always kept clean and have everything you need. You are a hop, skip and jump away from the beautiful beach and a short walk from Torquay jetty to have a fish! Thank you for always having us :)
Nice Place. Amenities a bit dated, however well maintained and clean. Great position, walk down the stairs and you are on the beach.|We will return
Great little tourist park, right on the water.  Kids loved having the beach straight outside their camper. Friendly managers, clean, tidy amenities.

Great campsite with clean amenities. The sites are quite large. It’s very convenient if you’ve booked a day trip to Fraser Island, as there is a bus stop where the Fraser Island companies usually pick people up.

Positiiviset:
- Rauhallinen ja viihtyisä ympäristö
- Kahviloita lähellä
- Oma puhdas ranta
- Hiljainen yöllä

Negatiiviset:
- WC tiloissa oli virtsan haju
Love this caravan park + Megan and Justin are super nice and helpful! Will be back

Great location, absolute beach front and close to the shops and restaurants. The park and amenities are clean and the staff are free. It's a great spot for a bike ride or a paddle or an easy swim. Just ensure you lock your bikes up with a good chain. Inspire of that we will be back for another stay in the new year.
Love the simplicity of the park, great views and breeze and clean
Ending up staying for 4 weeks,  it was fantastic, pool, spa, staff were fantastic
Very nice location with friendly helpful staff. Highly recommended.

Since the rebuild the sites are quite large. Enough room for a large van, awning and parking beside the awning, still with room around you. Roads are very wide to allow easy van backing. Toilet/showers/handbasin are combined in one room as ensuite arrangement. Large number in two locations. Very well kept green lawns and a good number of trees planted - still need another 5 years to get to full size. Shops and eateries accross the road.

Camping die erg vol wordt gezet, campers en caravans staan hutje mutje met nauwelijks ruimte ertussen. Weinig privacy. Sanitair is ok, maar erg verouderd. Ruimte om even je tanden te poetsen, is, net als de kampeerplaatsen, erg klein. Locatie is top, direct aan zee, met restaurants voor ieder budget binnen loopafstand.
We visit every year, always wonderful friendly staff, we are lucky enough to get a Beach side position,  lots of restaurants, takeaway and amenities close by

Recently stayed here - beachfront - and wow what a view to get up to each morning.  The park and facilities were clean.  The staff were lovely.  Campers were friendly.  Handy for  shops, pub and restaurants.
If we had one downside it was the hooners along the 40 km esplanade and not a police officer in sight.
Great place to stay clean & tidey

What a beautiful park. Very relaxing & peaceful. Easy to back onto sites, nice & spacious. Amenities blocks very clean with your own shower, toilet & change area. A few caravan parks are starting to use this set up. Definitely will stay here again. Close to cafes, restaurants.

Scarness Caravan Park has been a fantastic stay !! Darren has been so helpful for a solo traveller backing onto the site. He has happily answered all my questions about power hook up. The amenities are very clean and all utilities full:- paper towels, soaps, toilet paper etc. The camp kitchen ever so spotless clean. All electric appliances working. He is very friendly even after a long week and the ever late check-ins. My first caravan park stay in my new motor home was excellent!!

This is a well looked after park. Spotless and modern amenities. (could do with an extra hook or 2 in shower cubicle) Top camp kitchen.  Washers/dryers plentiful and $4 a pop....fantastic..on the beach and opposite mini mart and abundance of eateries.

Other reviews correctly mention the beachfront location, good facilities, clean amenities, and good size sites....

What they DON'T mention is the high security risk and the CONSTANT traffic noise at all hours!

This is also the first park in 3 years of travelling Australia that has immediately given me a written "Lock it up or lose it" note!
🤔
Unusual perhaps? - No!! .. not when you take into account that they DON'T have an entrance boom-gate (or anything similar!) and lots of passing pedestrian/bike/scooter traffic..
Other campers warned me not to leave my e-bikes out - irrespective of them being locked! ... and one older guest actually parked his mobility trike inside the secured toilet/shower block overnight!
😬

The traffic noise rarely lets up, and there seems to be a competition amongst the locals to see who has the loudest exhaust!!

So ... you've been warned!!

Yes, it's arguably the nicest caravan park on the Esplenade... but bring your earplugs and padlocks!

Returned here to this beautiful park . Friendliest managers we have come across on our trip . So Happy &  helpful.   Thanks Kay & Phil you are really two beautiful people,  this world could do with more like you . We will be back again . Oh yes ! Great location ,  the park is also close to restaurants,  pub,  coffee shops .

Sehr schöner und neuer Campingplatz direkt beim Strand. Die Stellplätze sind groß und das Gelände gepflegt. Die Waschräume sind sauber und groß. Wäsche waschen und trocknen kostet jeweils 4$ und kann mit Karte gezahlt werden.
Very nice spot maybe 50 Metres to  water very tidy  And clean
Very good, Nice

I was really impressed with this waterfront caravan park! The refurbished amenities were spotless, and the well-maintained grounds were just as impressive. The check-in process was quick and easy, and the location is fantastic. Highly recommend!
Clean and tidy sites. Friendly care takers. Highly recommend
Really really good park, had a great time. No issues at all.

Einer der schönsten Campingplätze auf unserem Trip entlang der Ostküste. Die Anlage wurde nagelneu renoviert, die Sanitäranlagen sind top. Man hat quasi ein eigenes Bad mit Dusche und Toilette. Die Lage direkt am Strand könnte nicht schöner sein. Hier lassen sich Sonnenauf- und Sonnenuntergang erleben. Auch nette Restaurants und kleine Shops sind gleich um die Ecke. Einziges Manko: der Platz liegt langgestreckt zwischen Strasse und Strand, so dass sich Verkehrslärm kaum vermeiden lässt. Deshalb unbedingt einen Platz direkt am Meer frühzeitig reservieren. Die Plätze an der Straße sind weniger attraktiv.
Didn't stay was only visiting

Friendly reception, amenities are exceptional, ocean frontage, spacious sites, beautiful kitchens, all very good.
The only thing it lacks is shade.
Can absolutely recommend. !!

This is a great camp, good location.2024 when we stayed for several weeks, could not fault this camp, every thing was up to scratch.
BUT 2025 when we were here for several weeks again.
Sorry to say sooo disappointed to see the grounds weren't maintained, could not see the gardens for weeds, plus the edges had never been whipper snipped as grass had grown over them. The concrete edges you could not see for over grown grass. Caravan concrete slabs there was about 3 inches of grass growing over ours. I'm afraid the relieving manager needs some good old fashioned training on how to keep grounds. It's not about putting your bum on a mower and and whipping around a site and mowing over the edge's thinking that will do. Get your whipper snipper out and do things properly, that's what makes a place stand out.
Never once did we see this being done. Don't say you don't have time... You didn't put a 8 hour day in the grounds. Recycling bottle bin was over flowing for 3 days..
Not acceptable for a camp.
Spiders and cobwebs in the corners of amenities. Maybe cleaners need more time for the extra bits.
Don't let this new camp go backwards.
Bring back Phil and Kate.

Had walked into the front entrance to see how busy it was before booking when we were approached by a worker. He asked what we were doing and when we said what we were doing the worker proceeded to point at all the cameras watching us around the site and said if we had any questions we were to go straight to reception. Absolutely disgusting attitude after we were just about to book a site for the night and we were treated intruders from the first encounter. There was no gates stopping anyone from walking in and we were simply getting a feel for the site before booking.
Redevelopment in progress

Very disappointed with the week we spent at this park particularly how much you pay for a beachfront site. No views and no assistance from management after requesting a different site. When requesting a different site we mentioned that we were not happy and when making the booking over the phone she should have told us that there was no view as we would have chosen a different site. Her response was “we have only been here a few weeks and not been out in the park to know about the sites” Seriously if you are going to manage a park the first thing would be to make yourself familiar with the layout of the sites. Maintenance is poor with bins overflowing, marks on walls in amenities, weeds in garden beds. Given that this park has been recently updated the upkeep is not happening from the management.
Großartiger campground, gaaaanz liebe Manager!!! Amenities first class, sites groß und rein, direkt an der Esplanade... Besser geht es nicht!

Best spot to camp in Hervey bay. New facilities and beach front.
Price is higher than others but worth it! Most things walking distance away with a convenience store over the road along with several restaurants and cafes.

I definitely enjoyed my stayed here! Not the cheapest but pretty worth for the clean toilets & shower & even a kitchen with tables & chairs!

Chose the space nearest to the bay & it was $66 but its probably pricey cause its hols season. Theres a stretch of restaurants just opposite this place.

Hervey Bay’s premier beachfront caravan park ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

This park has benefited from a major refurbishment and now boasts fabulous facilities along with an awesome location 🏖️

All sites are level with ample space between, new concrete single slabs, new lighting and utility posts

All amenities are new and generously outfitted while the location is just perfect 👌

North facing Scarness Beach on one side and a generous variety of Esplanade cafes, restaurants, hotel, grocery store and news agent, among others, across the street 👍

You don’t even have to bring a car as there’s a 50 cent council bus stop right outside 🚌

We found the staff to be great to book with and friendly & helpful during our stay ❤️
It would seem it’s a nice place. The couple running the park would have to be the least suited individuals I’ve had the displeasure of dealing with to be running such a park.

Of the parks along the esplanade this place was the pick. Staff were very friendly and the park is very quiet, albeit the late night car races and wanna be speed kings on the road  . Amenities are the best I have seen for a long time. Big dining area, big kitchen, showers and toilets are spotless, with the exception of that one person, that can read a sign.
Beach is pretty much on ya door step and the sea breeze kept it rather cool.
Dont come here if you want to run amok at night. It is an older crowd and I would say by 8.30pm at night, most are tucked up in the vans.
Would highly recommend this place to anyone.
Wonderful staff, great facilities, close to restaurants and bars.
Beautiful park, lovely green grass & slabbed sites. Park is right on the water. Amenities are new and immaculate.
Very nice well cared for. Great position.

We have spent several nights here over 2 trips, can't speak highly enough of this park, it is well managed, the facilities are modern, clean and well maintained and the location is 5 star you won't get a better beach front site at the price. The Management is always attentive and willing to assist with your needs.
Great park, fantastic location, best park in town

Made a booking and was told that we had beachfront. Arrived at the park & was told it wasn’t available anymore & happy to refund our money. After driving all day didn’t feel like finding another caravan park at 5pm. Said we would stay the night & head off in morning & we would have a refund. Only refunded partial of the extra. Disappointing 😌
Currently staying in the park and the amenities are next level amazing . Also so close to alot of restaurants, cafes pubs and clubs.
Great Caravan park right on the water.  Glorious breeze great service 👌

What a great park loved our recent stay even added a  night on the stay
Thanks
Right on the beach, clean and friendly, it was a wonderful place to stay.

This is it , the best place to stay in Hervey Bay,  just don't tell everyone.  It has great amenities and the staff are so friendly and accommodating it feels like my second home . It is close to everything, shops across the rd including a small supermarket if you forgot anything.  Highly recommend 👌

The office was locked when I arrived at 11:30 am. I phoned the contact number shown on the website but I could only leave a voicemail. I've waited for nearly 40 minutes and then left. The office was still closed and my voicemail was returned two hours later. Customer service doesn't exist in this place. I will never return to this caravan park.

We love coming to this park. Its position on the beach, the clean amenities, the friendly and attentive staff are worth the drive and we start to relax as soon as we arrive. Easy sites to get onto and great shops, coffee and parks within easy walk.
Ubicación excelente y servicios. Plazas grandes. Llegamos fuera de la hora de recepción y estaba todo explicado en un sobre. Muy bien
Stayed two nights at this location. Fantastic view of the ocean. Also close to all amenities at the park and the town. Walking distance to the beach and shops.

Great spot host was very helpful
Recommend the lady Elliott tour book through caravan park
Great location right on the beach and very near the Harvey Bay Surflifesaving Club. Clean amenities. Close to shops and restaurants. Popular so try to book early
A great place to stay short stay or longer, close to all cafes restaurants, hotel, waterfront views
Great location.  Tight sites but manager is happy to help

stayed 1 night in June, loved the site & booked that particular site for few days in Aug & paid in full(easy site access,  car parking off rd, less rd noise) the avail dates supplied by management. Arrived & advised that site was taken, offered smaller site at other end of park. Adjacent campers agreed to move their cars so we could get on-site, very tight! We declined, recieved partial refund & drove on. Happy to accept managements right to allocate sites as they want but really feel we should have been advised prior to arrival that someone else wanted that site more than we did & were given it!  We would've happily rebooked when that site was next available if we'd been advised. NOTE to others, common courtesy is a thing of the past & you don't always get what you want/pay for !

Staff were great
Amenities always spotless
Nice Sandy beach
If you get a spot in the front 2 rows, then 5 stars

But the row against the fence, don’t even bother, make sure u confirm which row you are in

Against the fence is 2 metres from the footpath, 3 metres from the road, which must have Qld share of hoons with extremely loud exhausts
Plus the crap from birds and trees on our new awning will take forever to clean.
These sites are so small no room to park your car, and if not for the staff help (Justin I think) I would still be trying to reverse in our van
Right on the waterfront close to the shops. Couldn’t ask for a better location. Perfect for that chill holiday

What a stunning place to stay. My favourite so far on the east coast. Friendly staff, great amenities and right on the beach! We parked up the van and went for a walk on the beach to find dolphins playing right in front of us! Magical. Would definitely recommend.
Very rude staff very regimented

We had an absolutely amazing stay. The site location was perfection, clean and flat. The new amenities are superior and clean and it was quiet with the birds waking you up for the morning. Highly recommend
Lovely check in staff! Very clean facilities and they have security during the night. Would definitely recommend to anyone.
The managers Phil and Kay were very helpful and professional during our stay. The park is kept immaculate, the only downside is the shower layout design. Overall we loved the place!

Fantastic Stay at Scarness Caravan Park -
We recently stayed at Scarness Caravan Park and couldn’t be happier with our experience. The park managers, Phil and Kay, were incredibly friendly and helpful. Kay was especially kind, assisting us in backing into our site. Not only does she keep the park spotless, but she is also continuously busy with maintenance, ensuring everything is in perfect condition, while at the same time,  being happy to stop for a pleasant chat, which added a personal touch to our stay.

The park itself boasts a beautiful beach front position in the heart of Hervey Bay,  with direct access shops and to a wide range of places to eat. There are generously sized blocks, and modern unisex amenities that are a spotlessly clean. Additionally, the shared outdoor kitchen is modern and clean, equipped with everything needed for a great meal outdoors.

We thoroughly enjoyed our time at Scarness Caravan Park and highly recommend it to anyone looking for a well-maintained and friendly place to stay. Whether you're here for a night or a longer holiday, Phil and Kay will make sure you feel right at home!
Great caravan park

Lovely spic and span and newly renovated. If anything a little clinical. Right on the beach. Amenities new and in a style we haven’t encountered, all individual unisex rooms. No issues with theft, just put valuable stuff away, which is a common theme with reviews of the foreshore parks. The sites are a reasonable size for a large van  but can be a bit tight to get in to as some of the new trees have been badly positioned. Its located across the road from some shops which is handy. The beach front sites are nice but if you cant get one the others are fine. Beautiful well appointed camp kitchen.
Sehr sauber, direkt am Strand, normale Preise, wenn man bedenkt, dass dies hier ein Topreiseziel ist.

This place is completely new and clean!
The beach was amazing and we really enjoyed the park here!

On top of it we had an issue with our RV and the owners were so kind - they let us come back after our check out and have our RV fixed in the park free of charge 🙏🏻 so grateful!

We stayed here 3 nights while visiting Fraser Island. Excellent location, very friendly staff and the installations were very nice and clean as well.

Amazing view to the beach and if you like running, this place is just next to the Esplanade that has a very long trail across the Coast.

We also dine at an Indian restaurant across the street from the Campground, was really nice and is very close to a Mini Market, ideal to buy last minute needs
Impeccable site. Extremely well maintained grounds and clean, modern amenities. We'll definitely be coming back.
Can’t be a good park if they don’t allow pets.
Great park. Quiet and on the beach. All newly renovated.
Amazing location, lovely and accomodating staff. Family friendly, beautiful new facilities. Came back to stay twice, would highly recommend!

We had an AWESOME TIME at Scarness Beachfront Tourist Park camping for 8 days. The amenities were cleaned every day and the park managers were wonderful and very kind always waved as they went past or just to stop and  chat.  All areas of the park were cleaned very say. All the camper were well behaved. All up I would give the Park a 10 out of 10. I really could not fault them. I will be more than happy to recommend this park to everyone I know.
Thank you so much.
They're still renovating will be breathtaking when finished

Stayed 4 days at this park 2 weeks  ago  and had the worst  experience  by the management  ever in 30 years  of  camping...started  with  day of arrival  and went  to office  to check  in and  was told  that i was early,  25 minutes  to be exact and as it started  to rain  i asked  if it  would  be ok to stax hitched  on a grassed  area  thst was not open  to camping  but nothing  there  and  was told  to come back in an hour  which  was past the stated  arrival  time...came  back  after  driving  around  to park  for  an hour  killing  time  then he wanted  to guide  us onto  our site which  took  20 minutes  of telling  my husband go forward    no go back,
turn your  wheel  this way ubby  has been has been  parking  our caravans  for 30 years  and only  takes a few minutes normally. This guy  had  no idea. Next the wife comes  and tells  us to move our car further  away  from  our awning and continued  to harass us daily  and when  on our last  day i moved our car around  the back  of our van  which  was  within  our site  she told  us we need  to move  it as it gets  boggy there and hub looks  up to a blue sky on a sunny  day with  no rain  predicted and we said  ok bit we'll  be going  out shortly  so it will  be moved  then...nect she comes  back  and tells us shehas put a mark  against  our name  as they have  to  cover  their  backs... neighbours  who  heard  all the harassment  came and said  they'd  had marks  against  their  name  too...omg they do not deserve  to  be managers put an absolute  damper on what had been  a wonderful  couple  of weeks  travelling  around...never will  go back  ther again  if they get the job of managing the new park when  finished 🙄

Strict managers but understand why. Not much in the way of amenities however we knew that when we booked. The ladies had 1 shower working and waited 4 mins for hot water. They unexpectedly closed the Mens toilets??? Cheap enough.

Only stayed two nights, should have stayed at two weeks!!!
Very comfortable, clean and a well run caravan park.
Kay was always helpful and made our stay one that we will remember for her courtesy and  efficiency.
Would always recommend stopping here to our friends and family.
It ticks most boxes & shoulnt disappoint
Very tidy and clean. Amazing views and managers very welcoming and accommodating. Walking distance to all places. Great spot

I really don't want to make this post as I don't want to encourage anyone else to know about this truly stunning spot. We try and not repeat trips, but this place keeps drawing us back.
I mean WOW. On the water, walk to everything you would possibly need and stunning views and sunsets. Just when i didn't think it could be any better, the dolphins did a swim-by yesterday afternoon. Do me a favour and don't come here, I want to be able to get in the next time I want to book.. 😁

Right on the waterfront. Food works store across the road. Other takeaway as well. Torquay pub just a  minutes walk away. Beautiful and quiet. Amenities clean and tidy.  Staff very helpful.  Couldn't rate this place any better. Well done guys and girls.
Great spot by the beach at Torquay. Never rains in Hervey bay ... Except always at Easter. Doesn't matter - even in a tent, it's worth it.
Older caravan park but facilities very clean staff lovely very helpful.
Yes your love

Lovely spot, good service. Could cool it with the amount of security cameras around the site, felt like I was on big brother. Bit of a stretch asking guests to mop the showers. Beautiful almost exclusive beach.

I have never been to a camp ground where the owners were this amazing. 2 out of 3 nights they came around with zooper doopers for the kids. Noticed that our ute wasn't at our site one night, so they followed up to make sure everything was secure and locked. I couldn't rate a place more highly.
Great place Jess and Darren great hosts

We have been coming here every year after Christmas for over 30 years. The caretakers Jess and Darren have been the best ever. They were both so very helpful and relaxed and did everything they could to make our holiday enjoyable. Everyone here feels the same way and wish that they would be here permanently. Thank you so much Jess and Darren we appreciate it.

Fantastic caravan site! Perfectly located just steps from the beach, offering stunning views and a relaxing atmosphere. The facilities are spotless, with well-maintained amenities. Site Managers Jess and Darren went above and beyond to ensure a great stay. Ideal for families or anyone looking for a peaceful coastal getaway. Highly recommend!

Die Lage des Campingplatzes ist direkt am Strand. Leider war unsere Site auch gleich direkt an einem Beach Access, sodass wir viele Personen gleich vor unserem Platz durchlaufen hatten. Auch waren die Waschmaschinen nicht mehr so sauber, die WC Anlagen dafür sehr schön. Die Stellplätze waren im Vergleich zu anderen Sites eher eng bemessen.
Noisy van park from traffic on esplanade, bit run down,not worth the small site  for price.
Right in the water, amazing views
Very noisy from esplanade traffic, needs bigger sites.

Great all round. We’re regulars and the whole place is spotless all the time. Managers Are always friendly and helpful and keep a general eye on security in the park.  Yesterday’s sunset from beachfront!

Frazer Coast Beach front Tourist Park. This campground has been fully renovated recently. I would say it is the gold standard in the Hervey Bay area. Management  is  doing a great job in keeping this ground clean and tidy. It has two beautiful and well-appointed undercover kitchens, including tables and benches to sit down and eat. Also, the amenities, toilets, and showers are well laid out and clean. We had a great time staying here and highly recommend this place.

Beautiful location right on the beachfront. Lovely beach for safe swimming. Helpful staff. Great sunset spot. Location is good for day trips to K'gari. Would definitely come back here again and recommend to others.

A great little caravan park with beach front sites available.
We were a row from the beach, and were thankful as it was quite windy during our stay. Enjoyed the radio that was on in the amenities block, which are very tidy. Thank you to the manager/owners who pay attention to the many details to keep a park looking good!
Spent the long weekend here with the little kids. Had a blast, will definitly be coming back in the near future
Spent a few nights with the van , great little clean park , friendly assistive staff , super close to a sheltered beach ,

We always wanted to stay at this place for many years before we purchased a caravan as its the best location in town.  Our first trip north from brisbane we had to make a booking, We managed to jag a spot along the beach front. Stunning views and early morning walks along the beach.

Came for a two-night stay, loved the grounds as they were kept very tidy at all times by the diligent staff, Justin and Megan. The common areas were always clean and there was never a wait for any amenities. The trees provided lovely natural shade and shelter from the wind. There are two access points right onto the beach and you can hear the waves softly at night to lull you to sleep... Megan very kindly sorted me out with a whale watching tour, organising the courtesy bus to pick me up and bring me back at the bus stop right out the very front. Bins were also easy to access.
Nice van Park, clean facilities, roomy sites, easy beach access.

Bit worn out, but facilities clean.
Frequently crowded
Location is very good. On thr beach yet close to shops restaurants. A shared pathway that runs the length of the foreshore runs right past.
Great caravan park  managers very nice Really  enjoy  our stay here
Fantastic little caravan park on the coast - you need to book. Has fantastic management who do all they can to be helpful

Stayed 14 nights at Torquay. We had a powered van site backing onto the beach. We booked a year in advance to ensure the site we wanted and it was a magic stay. Booked again for next year. Clean amenities and grounds  and Justin runs a tight ship. Easy beach walking and well kept level pathways above the beach. 100 metres from esplanade shops and services, so everything at hand in walking distance.
Great location, friendly staff, right on the beach, close to shops
Facilities could do with a good clean and refurbish. Bit crowded on some sites with no parking allocation.  Beautiful location
Very poor service booked in 12 months with a group and was put into the other side of the away from the group and they didn’t do anything to fix wouldn’t recommend there service in the office
Amazing location, sparkling clean facilities. Right on the beach, close to shops and playground and patrolled beach for swimming = great for kids. Also lots of trees for shade
Despite bad weather it's a real bch town.ln nice weather it'd be great.
Ould retire at this place. Clean amenities and great customer service
Awesome location. Amenities in great keep and the best staff. Had a great stay. Thank you Justin & Megan
Great spot.
The park is right near the beach. Very clean and well run park

Ocean front views for $56 a night right next to the amenities and camp kitchen. Regular powered sites are even cheaper.
K’gari (Fraser island) blocked the wind making it soo calm and quiet
I will absolutely be back.
If in the area check out Fraser coast tourist parks there’s a couple more parks just like this one very close by. They’re all council owned parks on the beach with great prices I wouldn’t want to stay anywhere else

Booked a spot and could not get my carevan in as the spot in front shouldn't have been booked out. Moved from see view to non see view. Did not complain about it, so I understood that it was an error and move on .Then parked my Ute under a tree that no one was using as it was very hot and was in trouble for having it there. Wasn't asked in a propper manner to move it. It is standard to book nest years spot as I was told by the staff when the error was made a day ago to do it went in to do so thinking about it and want to move to a better spot checking availability on it once again not helped in a proper manner no we are not taking bookings for November nest year but yesterday I was asked to do so A great place to stay nice and clean but o boy the staff are not so great It's a shame that a great holiday that we waited on a hole year turned in to rubbish Will I come back nest year NO NEVER AGAIN
Camped in tents, great position on the beach front, very exposed to the wind. Noise from the street was intrusive. Staff friendly and helpful. Amenities were clean,eg. Bathroom and Camp Kitchen.

Ok, aber die Sanitären Anlagen waren wirklich in die Jahre gekommen und aus dem Duschkopf tropfte langsam und wenig Wasser.
Direkt am Abgang zum Strand ins Meer gehen die Rohre rein....

Nice campground, sites are pretty close together and quite small - if you have a large rig you may struggle. Access to the beach is great, bathrooms are clean although not a lot of hot water. Lots of noise from the road though, cars racing up and down the esplanade at all hours of the night.

Mooie plaats om te staan met een camper of tent. Momenteel waren er veel senioren. Deze mensen waren niet erg vriendelijk. Voor een jong stel of ouders met kinderen zou ik adviseren om verder te kijken.
Beautiful beachfront spot with a very friendly woman at front desk. The toilets were ok and pretty clean. The only negatives - it was quite loud but not completely through the night and no wifi.

I had a wonderful 4 night stay with my children and a few families over the school holidays.  We had a lovely beachfront site which was just fabulous. I loved the convenience to the shops and activities.     The managers are so friendly, helpful and well organised.  We'll be back next year.
:)
Very full campsite, we only stayed for one night and that was fine but wouldn't necessarily want to stay longer. The location was good, though.

The lady at the desk walked the extra mile with me. She helped me so much with my booking to Fraser Island and gave me all the time I needed.
Thank you so much you were respectful, helpful, pleasant and patient. Nettie
Will come and stay next time.
Hosts are great. Park good right on the beach.
Park is clean and tidy but amenities are old and small need replacing with upgraded facilities for the number of sites
Nice and clean friendly staff ,but keep all your valuables  locked up .unfortunately we were relieved of some of our camping equipment during the night

In this caravan park be prepared to be packed in like sardines in a can. Getting your van in and out of its allocated slot is next to impossible without help.
Location and amenities are just fine and it’s great to be right next to the beach.
Very good

Was put on a corner block on the beach front site we had to park on the wrong side of the concrete slab because a caravan had parked there car where I was supposed to put my camper so we had to park on the wrong side and open up half on the concrete slab it was hard to get out as there was another van parked on the next site in front of us it was school holidays and that end were picked like sardines
Location is good but sites are small and had issues with hot water .
Right on the beachfront and great views to watch the sunsets
Great location , right on the beach and a short walk to shops. Friendly and very helpful staff. Clean , quiet and relaxing park. Highly recommend
